_comment: true-up trues up ITSELF, MARKER-FREE. The command surface is the source-of-truth, generated to meta/contract.json (steward) by `node meta/build-contract.mjs` from `true-up capabilities`. The docs that restate it derive-facts-from those command facts via `seed` below — NO inline markers in any file. Change a command's contract -> `true-up --impact meta/contract.json#commands.<name>` (or `run --since`) flags exactly the docs that cite it. The contract steward's own freshness vs the engine is gated by `meta/build-contract.mjs --check` (CI). The public-surface zone keeps machine-local paths out.
